base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of creating_new_city — a ui from 1989 simcity. New-city creation flow — terrain-randomize + starting-money + name-entry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: New-city creation flow — terrain-randomize + starting-money + name-entry
